summary: Track strict pointing gestures by index fingertip instead of palm center and tolerate brief classifier dropouts.
scope: Use mirrored indexTip coordinates for pointing start, distance, dominance and center crossing.
Require a closed thumb, middle, ring and little finger with only the index finger extended.
Capture the fingertip at the first stable candidate frame rather than after activation movement is lost.
Continue fingertip tracking through up to 180ms of Pointing_Up classifier fluctuation when landmark geometry remains valid.
validation: swift test passed 22 tests including fixed-palm fingertip movement, classifier grace and strict pointing geometry
TypeScript typecheck and 32 Web regression tests passed
Release app build and strict codesign verification passed
Installed bundle reports version 0.7.2 build 12 and MediaPipe GPU reached ready state
notes: The 14 percent distance and center-crossing safety gates remain unchanged for the first physical trial.
macos-v0.7.1 remains the rollback point before this fingertip tracking fix.
